chart_title: Expectation of Iinfective life for 50% of females
caption: Fig 8. Expectation of infective life (l) in days for \(50\%\) of the females of Aedes aegypti females according to the EIP at constant temperatures of \(24^{\circ}C\) , \(27^{\circ}C\) and \(30^{\circ}C\) , plotted against the parity rates.
short_title: Infective life expectation versus parity rate by temperature
source_title: Parity and Longevity of Aedes aegypti According to Temperatures in Controlled Conditions and Consequences on Dengue Transmission Risks
